Class InputSafetyChecking

java.lang.Object
Test.InputSafetyChecking
public class InputSafetyChecking extends Object
The InputSafetyChecking class is used to check all user input for exceptions

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructor
    Description
    InputSafetyChecking()
     

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static String
    matchColor(String chunk, int start)
    Returns token color that matches with the start of the input from starting index
    static String
    normalizeUpper(String input)
    Returns uppercase of input without whitespaces in the front and back
    static List<String>
    parseThreeColorsFlexibly(String rawInput, String[] takeColors)
    Returns a list of 3 token colors if colors valid, null otherwise
    static int
    readIntInRange(Scanner sc, int minInclusive, int maxInclusive, String prompt)
    Returns valid number within specified range
    static int
    safeInt(Scanner sc, String invalidPrompt)
    Returns a valid integer after checking for exceptions

  • Constructor Details

    • InputSafetyChecking

      public InputSafetyChecking()

  • Method Details

    • safeInt

      public static int safeInt(Scanner sc, String invalidPrompt)
      Returns a valid integer after checking for exceptions
      Parameters:
      sc - Scanner
      invalidPrompt - Prompt if user input invalid
      Returns:
      integer

    • readIntInRange

      public static int readIntInRange(Scanner sc, int minInclusive, int maxInclusive, String prompt)
      Returns valid number within specified range
      Parameters:
      sc - Scanner
      minInclusive - Minimum number of range inclusive
      maxInclusive - Maximum number of range inclusive
      prompt - Prompt for input
      Returns:
      valid user input of number within the specified range

    • parseThreeColorsFlexibly

      public static List<String> parseThreeColorsFlexibly(String rawInput, String[] takeColors)
      Returns a list of 3 token colors if colors valid, null otherwise
      Parameters:
      rawInput - String input of 3 token colors
      takeColors - String array of all token colors
      Returns:
      list of 3 valid token colors, null otherwise

    • normalizeUpper

      public static String normalizeUpper(String input)
      Returns uppercase of input without whitespaces in the front and back
      Parameters:
      input - String input
      Returns:
      input trimmed and uppercase

    • matchColor

      public static String matchColor(String chunk, int start)
      Returns token color that matches with the start of the input from starting index
      Parameters:
      chunk - String input
      start - Starting index of string input to look at
      Returns:
      token color that matches with the start of the input from starting index
